description_long: This humanoid robot features a sleek, streamlined body with a smooth blue exterior and subtle purple highlights on the head, shoulders, and spine. Its head is elongated and angular, with a pronounced crest and a glowing purple spot at the center of the forehead. The torso is broad at the shoulders and tapers down to a narrow waist, with two glowing white lights on the upper chest. The arms and legs are proportionate and human-like, ending in five-fingered hands and feet. Along the back, a series of raised, glowing purple nodes run down the spine, giving it a futuristic, bio-mechanical appearance. The overall design is minimalist, with no visible clothing or external accessories, emphasizing an advanced, synthetic form.
description: A sleek blue humanoid robot with glowing purple highlights, an angular head crest, and a series of illuminated nodes along its spine.
description_view_0: Front view shows the robot's glowing chest lights, angular head crest, and smooth, human-like limbs.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the elongated head shape, smooth profile, and the raised nodes along the back.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the full row of glowing purple nodes along the spine and the broad shoulders tapering to a narrow waist.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the head crest, smooth limb contours, and the subtle curvature of the back.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with arms relaxed at the sides, legs straight, and head facing forward.
attribute_clothing_style: Unclothed; exterior consists of integrated smooth panels with glowing accents and no visible garments.
attribute_facial_features: Face is angular with a pronounced crest, no visible mouth or nose, and a glowing purple spot at the forehead; eyes are not distinctly visible.
attribute_limb_articulation: Arms and legs have visible shoulder, elbow, hip, and knee joints, suggesting hinge or ball articulation; hands and feet are human-like with articulated fingers and toes.
